nodes.name: Hypsipetes
nodes.summary: Hypsipetes（Hypsipetes）是图谱中的分类级分类节点，当前关联26种鸟类，如Nicobar bulbul、Philippine bulbul、Mindoro bulbul等26种鸟类。

nodes.name: Banggai golden bulbul
nodes.summary: Banggai golden bulbul（Hypsipetes harterti）是图谱中的分类级分类节点，当前关联1种鸟类，如Banggai golden bulbul。

nodes.name: Banggai golden bulbul
nodes.summary: The Banggai golden bulbul (Hypsipetes harterti) is a species of passerine bird in the bulbul family Pycnonotidae. It is endemic to Banggai Island in Indonesia. Its natural habitat is subtropical or tropical moist lowland forests. The Banggai golden bulbul was formerly considered as conspecific with five other bulbuls, all called the northern golden bulbul before they were all split. This bulbul is now both placed with 24 other species in the genus Hypsipetes that was introduced in 1831 by Nicholas Vigors. References
